makeMockStoreEvent.description: Creates a mock StoreRuntimeEvent with defaults (id: 'evt_test_001', sessionId: 'ses_test', runId: 'lane_test_01', actor: 'lifecycle', eventType: 'plan.produced')

makeMockPredicateContext.description: Creates a mock PredicateContext with defaults for testing predicate evaluation

makeInitialCampaignState.description: Creates a mock CampaignState with defaults (currentState: 'created', laneId: 'lane-1', campaignId: 'camp-1')

makeMockBinder.description: Creates a full mock Binder with ALL 24 fields populated: schemaVersion, binderVersion, laneId, campaignId, status, missionObjective, laneScope, claimedFiles, dependencyLaneIds, scoutReports, criticReviews, executionEvents, transitionEvents, validationResults, redTeamFindings, repairHistory, residualRisks, createdAt, artifactDigest

makeMockArtifactRef.description: Creates mock ArtifactRef with defaults (refType: 'scout', artifactSha: 'sha256-mock', producedBy: 'test-scout', producedAt: ISO timestamp, description: 'mock artifact')

makeMockEventRef.description: Creates mock EventRef with defaults (eventId: 'evt-test-001', eventType: 'test.event', ts: '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z', summary: 'test event')

makeMockEventStoreService.description: Creates a Ref<StoreRuntimeEvent[]> backed in-memory EventStore. Implements EventStore.Interface with record() (appends to Ref) and query() (filters by runId, laneId, eventType, limit). Returns EventStore.Service.of({ record, query })
makeMockEventStoreService.query_method: Ref.get(events).pipe(Effect.map(...)) — filters by runId, laneId, eventType, limit

secretaryTestLayer.construction:
const mockEventStoreLayer = Layer.effect(EventStore.Service, makeMockEventStoreService)
const secretaryTestLayer = Secretary.layer.pipe(Layer.provide(mockEventStoreLayer))
secretaryTestLayer.description: Provides Secretary.layer with the mock EventStore layer, replacing the real DB-backed EventStore. Does NOT mock Binder — uses the real BinderLayer under Secretary.layer.

effect_runPromise.description: Every async test wraps an Effect.gen program with await Effect.runPromise(program.pipe(Effect.provide(secretaryTestLayer)))

effect_gen_test_construction.description: Tests define a `program = Effect.gen(function* () { ... })` block, yield* secretary methods, return result values, then run via Effect.runPromise

layer_provide.description: Layer.provide is used in two places: (1) constructing secretaryTestLayer via .pipe(Layer.provide(mockEventStoreLayer)) at line 1212, (2) providing secretaryTestLayer to program via .pipe(Effect.provide(secretaryTestLayer)) in each test

createLane.signature: (campaignId: string, scope: string, dependencies: string[]) => Effect.Effect<string>

init.description: Used to simulate process restart — reconstructs state from EventStore

describe_blocks.name: toStoreEvent: CriticComplete verdict-aware
describe_blocks.covers: toStoreEvent mapping for CriticComplete(rejected/approved), payloadJson, laneId/campaignId, and other RuntimeEvent types (RedTeamCompleted, CheckpointCreated)

describe_blocks.name: STATE_ROLE and getRoleForState: canonical state names
describe_blocks.covers: getRoleForState for all state tags (scouting, critic_review, red_team, historian, returned, created, failed, blocked), STATE_ROLE key completeness

describe_blocks.name: RuntimeEvent types per role: correct SM and store mapping
describe_blocks.covers: RedTeamCompleted (blocking/non-blocking), Blocked, Failed, ScoutComplete, ArchitectComplete, CheckpointCreated, CriticComplete (approved/rejected), ExecutorComplete, ValidatorComplete (passed/failed) — both toSMEvent and toStoreEvent

describe_blocks.name: toSMEvent: checkpoint and lane-returned paths
describe_blocks.covers: CheckpointCreated → session.checkpoint mapping, LaneReturned → lane.returned mapping, CriticComplete paths in toSMEvent

describe_blocks.name: deriveAllowedTools: canonical LaneState coverage
describe_blocks.covers: deriveAllowedTools for scouting, critic_review, red_team, historian, executing, validating, and terminal states

describe_blocks.name: Full happy-path: pure function chain across lifecycle
describe_blocks.covers: toStoreEvent and toSMEvent mapping for every lifecycle tag, round-trip between toStoreEvent and toSMEvent, full spine through all lifecycle events

describe_blocks.name: Red-team blocking prevents progression
describe_blocks.covers: Blocked event SM/store mapping, blocking findings in RedTeamCompleted, reason/error payload persistence

describe_blocks.name: Binder reconstruction: pure function consistency
describe_blocks.covers: Structural equivalence of toStoreEvent/toSMEvent for identical inputs, validation fail/pass event types, required StoreRuntimeEvent fields

describe_blocks.name: Terminal finalization preserves evidence
describe_blocks.covers: Binder evidence preservation after terminalStatus set, non-empty artifactDigest

describe_blocks.name: Red-team blocking prevents historian transition
describe_blocks.covers: State transitions: redteam_completed with no blockers → historian, with blockers → repairing

describe_blocks.name: Deterministic replay
describe_blocks.covers: reduceCampaignState determinism (same inputs → same output), identity for empty events

tests.name: service: create lane → process full lifecycle → binder has evidence
verifies: state transitions (scouting, scoped, designing, criticizing, executing, validating, red_team, historian, returned)

tests.name: service: restart recovery preserves binder evidence
service: red-team blocking finding prevents historian
lifecycle_steps: createLane → scout → architect → critic → executor → validator → redteam(blocking finding)
verifies: blocking finding prevents progression to historian

tests.name: finalizeBinder is idempotent — calling twice returns same binder
lifecycle_steps: createLane → scout → architect → critic → executor → redteam → returnLane (auto-finalizes)

tests.name: terminal finalization does not erase accumulated evidence
lifecycle_steps: createLane → scout → architect → critic → executor → redteam → returnLane
verifies: scoutReports, criticReviews, executionEvents, transitionEvents, validationResults, redTeamFindings, repairHistory, residualRisks all present

tests.name: service: init replay produces same state as live progression
tests.covers: Full lifecycle progression, then init() to replay from EventStore, verifying same state

tests.name: service: reduceCampaignState — same events → same state
tests.covers: reduceCampaignState determinism with multiple event sequences

g15_lifecycle_coverage.description: G15 service-level integration tests (lines 1216-1526) cover the full lane lifecycle from creation through return

g16_coverage.description: G16 binder finalization tests (lines 1528-1697) verify idempotency and evidence preservation after finalization

spine_test_gaps.description: What a comprehensive spine test needs to cover that existing tests do not

untested_secretary_methods.importance: Medium — triggers role dispatch; needed for real agent workflow
Medium — reconstructs lane from EventStore; needed for persistence boundaries

untested_binder_fields: schemaVersion — never verified that it's set to 'v1'
binderVersion — never verified that it increments or is set
laneId — never verified that it matches the created lane ID
campaignId — never verified that it matches the createLane campaignId
missionObjective — never verified that it's populated from createLane or processEvent
laneScope — never verified that it matches the createLane scope param
claimedFiles — never verified that ClaimsAcquired files persist
dependencyLaneIds — never verified that createLane dependencies persist
architecturePlan — never verified that architect RoleOutput planRef persists
approvedPlan — never verified that approved plan ref persists
diffSummary — never verified for executor output
checkpointCommit — never verified for CheckpointCreated persistence
handoffSummary — never verified for handoff event persistence
completedAt — never verified as set on finalization
untested_error_paths: InvalidEventError — processEvent with invalid event for current state
LaneNotTerminalError — getLaneBinder before lane is terminal
BinderError — Binder sub-operations failing (e.g., addScoutReport on missing binder)
untested_lifecycle_states: repairing — no test exercises the redteam → repairing → redteam loop
blocked — Blocked state tests are pure-function only (not service-level)
failed — Failed state tests are pure-function only (not service-level)
claims_gate — no service-level test for claims_gate transition
untested_concurrency: Same lane processed from two concurrent fibers
EventStore record → query consistency under parallel operations
untested_edge_cases: init on a lane with 0 events in EventStore
missing_round_trip: No test verifies that toStoreEvent(→ EventStore.record) → EventStore.query → reconstruct produces identical LaneState/Binder
structural_gaps: No test verifies the full event log content (just counts/lengths, not actual payload content)
No test verifies artifactDigest stability across process restarts (only same session init)
No test verifies that the mock EventStore actually records ALL events (no count check)
No test uses the real EventStore.query filtering capabilities (runId, laneId, eventType, limit)

smoking_guns.description: Key observations from the pattern analysis

findings.finding: makeMockBinder covers 19 of 24 Binder fields but 7 optional/structural fields are never populated in the mock (architecturePlan, approvedPlan, diffSummary, checkpointCommit, handoffSummary, terminalStatus, completedAt) — these same 7 fields are also NEVER asserted in any test
findings.implication: When the production path sets these fields, tests have zero coverage

findings.finding: The Secretary methods launchRole and loadLane have ZERO test coverage — no test in the 1790-line file calls them
findings.implication: If these methods have bugs, they will only be discovered in integration

findings.finding: Error paths (LaneNotFoundError, InvalidEventError, LaneNotTerminalError, BinderError) have zero test coverage — all service-level tests run the happy path only
findings.implication: Production error handling is completely untested

findings.finding: G15/G16 tests verify binder evidence by checking array lengths, not actual content — no test checks that scoutReports[0].artifactSha contains the expected value
findings.implication: A bug that records empty/corrupt artifacts would still pass all tests

findings.finding: The mock EventStore does not validate event structure; it blindly appends anything. The production EventStore goes through Drizzle ORM with schema validation.
findings.implication: Mock-store tests could pass with malformed events that the real store would reject

findings.finding: secretaryTestLayer uses the real BinderLayer (not mocked), meaning binder.ts bugs would surface in these tests — but binder internal state is tested indirectly through Secretary
findings.implication: No isolated Binder.Interface tests exist anywhere in the codebase
